  • Uses of BeanIgnore in org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.bean.rfc7807 with annotations of type BeanIgnore
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    URI
    Problem.getTypeOrDefault()
    Returns the type URI, defaulting to Problem.DEFAULT_TYPE ("about:blank") per RFC 7807 §3.1 when the field is null.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.http with annotations of type BeanIgnore
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MediaRanges
    A parsed Accept or similar header value.
    class 
    MediaType
    Describes a single media type used in content negotiation between an HTTP client and server, as described in Section 14.1 and 14.7 of RFC2616 (the HTTP/1.1 specification).
    class 
    StringRange
    Represents a single value in a comma-delimited header value that optionally contains a quality metric for comparison and extension parameters.
    class 
    StringRanges
    A parsed Accept-Encoding or similar header value.
